creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
I build ksh93 on amd64 prior to every single release.  I run daily on an 
amd64 machine.

Something is wrong with permissions in the method you use to build ports.

I test using straight make-commands and build my final installed version 
using portupgrade.

Please explain to me the method you follow exactly, including user-id, 
permissions and anything else you might think is relevant.

/Joe
